title: galearis constricta
intro: Galearis constricta, also known as the autumn gentian, is a perennial herb that belongs to the gentian family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Galearis constricta include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Galearis constricta can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for various health benefits.
